Frequently Asked Questions

1. Why should I choose Flitpay to trade Cryptocurrency?

Flitpay is a popular cryptocurrency exchange in India with competitive trading fees and zero registration costs. It offers best-in-class security and features for free, like Spot and OTC Trading, Practice trading account, Crypto Earn, and Crypto Gift cards. On Flitpay, one can easily trade BTC and other cryptocurrencies in INR and USDT.

2. How Do I Convert BTC to USDT (Tether)?

Converting BTC to USDT through Flitpay is a simple step; if you have BTC in your Flitpay account, choose the USDT trading pair and place a sell order for the amount of BTC you want to convert to USDT. You will receive USDT in your Flitpay account as soon as the order is executed.

3. Is Bitcoin legal in India?

Yes, trading and investing in Bitcoin is legal in India. However, there have yet to be any regulations and laws introduced by the Government of India. But, imposing a 30% tax and 1%TDS signifies that you can freely trade Bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies.

4. How Can I Deposit INR to my Flitpay Account?

To deposit INR on Flitpay, sign in to your Flitpay account, and go to wallet > INR deposit. Choose the deposit type as per your amount and then send funds from your bank account to the mentioned Flitpay’s bank account details. You can also deposit through UPI.

5. How Can I Withdraw INR from my Flitpay Account?

To withdraw INR from Flitpay, sign in to your Flitpay account, and go to wallet > INR withdrawal. Transfer your INR funds smoothly and instantly to your verified bank account.

6. What minimum INR can I deposit on Flitpay?

You can deposit and trade on Flitpay for as low as INR100. If you are using a demo/practice trading account, the virtual balance will be credited by Flitpay in that case. However, you cannot withdraw the profit from your Practice Trading Account to your bank account.

7. How to deposit crypto on Flitpay?

Flitpay supports deposits and withdrawals of cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin (BTC), Ethereum(ETH), Tether (USDT), Tron (TRX), Ripple (XRP) and many more. To know more about the Deposit and Withdrawal process, refer to the detailed guide.

8. Is Flitpay the safest crypto exchange in India?

Flitpay is the most secure, safe and transparent exchange in India. It keeps the majority of its user funds in offline wallets. However, it is always advised to keep your Flitpay account and password details safe and secure to avoid personal security threats.

9. What is OTC?

Over-the-Counter (OTC) or off-exchange trading is done directly between the parties without any supervision of an exchange. Long story short, it refers to the process of how securities are traded via a broker-dealer network as opposed on a centralized exchange.

10. How to buy Bitcoin on Flitpay?

You can by Bitcoin using Flitpay Cryptocurrency exchange by firstly depositing INR into your Flitpay account and from there you can purchase it.

11. Is Cryptocurrency taxable in India?

Every Indian crypto investor, whether using an Indian or an international exchange, is liable to pay cryptocurrency taxes as applicable by the Indian Government.

12. Which crypto exchange is best for crypto staking in India?

Higher interest earning, easy-to-use interface, and flexible plan offering make Flitpay the best and most opted crypto staking and reward platform in India. You can stake and earn yearly interest of up to 12% on top cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin (BTC), Ethereum (ETH), Shiba Inu (SHIB), Polygon (MATIC), Cardano (ADA) and a lot more.

13. What is Quick Buy/Sell?

Quick Buy/Sell is the OTC platform of Flitpay facilitating instant buying and selling of your favourite cryptocurrencies with minimum slippage and zero transaction fees.

About Flitpay
Flitpay is one of the best cryptocurrency exchanges in India, built to provide a boost to the decentralized world of Finance. It is a one-stop solution for all your crypto needs. You can Stake, Gift, Trade, Invest and do much more with your cryptocurrencies.
Why Flitpay?
Flitpay is one of the top cryptocurrency exchanges in India, trusted by 1 Million users for the robust security and transparency it provides to the users. It is the safest crypto exchange providing multi-factor authentication and security to its’ users’ funds by storing most of it in the cold wallets.
Earn/staking
Why keep your crypto investments idle when they can earn for you? Stake and earn high annual rewards on your crypto assets at the best crypto staking platform in India. Flitpay’s crypto staking platform is flexible, easy to use and provides high annual returns on cryptocurrencies.
Buy/Sell Crypto
Buy, Sell and Trade your go-to cryptocurrencies unlimitedly and smoothly with the lowest trading fees up to ZERO. Enjoy the lowest INR, crypto deposit, and withdrawal fees on India’s top cryptocurrency exchange and make your crypto journey exciting and rewarding.
Gift Cards
Crypto Gift Cards are the best way to give someone a valuable gift. Flitpay’s Bitcoin Gift cards have the edge over others as these can be customized as per the occasion and can be delivered virtually through e-mail or message or physically to the doorsteps of your loved ones.
Learn
It is always said, “To earn more, you must learn more.” Before investing explore and learn about Bitcoin, Metaverse, NFTs, Web3, DeFi, and Dapps and equip yourself with the latest crypto news and updates on Floki Inu, ADA, Polygon, Shiba INU, Saitama Inu, Dogecoin and all the major cryptocurrencies through our blog page.

What is Flitpay?
Flitpay is the high-end secured trading platform for digital assets such as Bitcoin (BTC), Ethereum (ETH), Ripple (XRP), USD Tether (USDT), DOGE Coin (DOGE), Shiba ...Inu (SHIB), and many more. It offers a higher margin cryptocurrency trading through a peer-to-peer funding network. Flitpay has the most secured transaction policy that allows you to trade with no fear of crypto mining. Our live trading chart gets updated after every 5 seconds that allows a trader to get a chance to reap the high ROI.
Best Exchange to Buy Bitcoin in India
Flitpay is one of the best crypto exchange aggregator in India. With its navigational platform, Flitpay has had made it easy to perform trading on the platform. Serving thousands of exchanges every day, we pledge to keep the transparency as our other utmost priority. With no hidden charges, we tend to deliver the optimal exchange rate that you may not find elsewhere.
Buy Cryptocurrency in India by Flitpay
As the optimum crypto exchange platform in India, you will never regret choosing us. Due to the unstable laws on cryptocurrency, you may fear of losing your asset. But not with us. We have a high-end security system that allows only its user to get access to the wallet. We are soon coming up with other security aspects to secure your assets in the future.
Buy Cryptocurrency in INR
In India, you can buy/exchange or sell any cryptocurrency for other forms of value. Flitpay provides trust and transparency by authenticating users and promises to keep high-end security to protect your wallet from every type of crypto minings. If you are in profit and wants to withdraw some, submit the proper details and take profit home within no time.
What is Bitcoin?
A decentralized blockchain-based cryptocurrency that uses peer-to-peer technology to operate with no central authority or banks. The issuing of Bitcoin and managing transaction are done directly by the network. Long story short, it is money in digital form that's instant, private and free from bank fees.
Benefits of Crypto Trading in India
The progress of cryptocurrencies in the blockchain domain brought greater potential in the trading industry. Indian market is full of opportunities if we talk about cryptocurrencies, as the financial firms have welcomed the nuances of virtual currencies. It will be a good option to mention the P2P model, as the Indian exchange were quick to adopt different modes of trading in crypto. However, the ban has been dissolved, more Indians will be able to build wealth through trading and investing in cryptocurrencies.
